lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on both the interior and exterior. The car is currently operational but will require some maintenance and minor repairs in the near future.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It is operational but shows noticeable wear on both the exterior and interior. Some mechanical components may require attention in the near future.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable ride! While it shows some honest wear from its years of service, it remains a steady performer that's ready to get you where you need to go. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable vehicle at a budget-friendly price. It has plenty of life left for its next owner!

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster without a single scratch, chip, or blemish. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with the leather upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear. Mechanically, it performs flawlessly, having been meticulously maintained and garage-kept its entire life. It drives exactly as it did the day it was first sold. For a buyer seeking perfection, this car offers showroom quality in every detail.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts reliably, with no current mechanical issues to report. The interior is clean and smoke-free, though there is some minor wear on the driver's seat and floor mats consistent with regular use. On the exterior, the paint still has a great shine, but you will find a few small stone chips on the hood and a light scratch on the rear passenger door. All electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. It is a solid, dependable car that is ready for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its consistent maintenance history and reliable performance. This unit exemplifies structural integrity and aesthetic refinement, offering a superior ownership experience for the discerning driver. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this motorcar represents an exceptional acquisition for those prioritizing mechanical dependability and long-term value.

Hey there! Thanks for checking out my car! It’s been a fantastic ride for me, super reliable and still looking sharp. It's in really solid shape and ready to hit the road with a new owner who will appreciate it as much as I have. Perfect for your daily commute or a weekend getaway! Drop me a message if you're interested—I'd love to chat more about it!

This BMW E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six engine, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system for optimized volumetric efficiency across the power band. The drivetrain utilizes a Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox paired with a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring precise torque vectoring. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive rod bearing replacement. The chassis is tuned with upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers to sharpen turn-in response and mitigate body roll. A mechanically sound driver’s car that
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well. Inspections welcome.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and a premium feel. The exterior presents beautifully, showing only the minor, expected signs of road use that come with a car that has been driven with care. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting, with all features—from the climate control to the infotainment system—functioning exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has a complete service history, recent oil and filter changes, and tires with plenty of tread remaining. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride and consistent performance, making it a dependable choice for anyone seeking a quality vehicle that has been treated with respect. Ready for the road with no immediate maintenance required.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of quality and value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Featuring a clean profile and a consistent mechanical history, it offers a refined driving experience and reliable performance. We invite you to experience the caliber of this exceptional offering firsthand.

Hey there! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold to me! It’s in solid shape, runs super smooth, and has been really well-loved over the years. Whether you’re commuting to work or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car is totally ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!
Offering a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54B32 3.2L inline-six. This high-
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained engine. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean interior. All systems functional.

This exceptionally well-maintained luxury sedan strikes the perfect balance between sophisticated performance and everyday comfort. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that remains vibrant, showing only minor signs of road use such as light stone chips on the front fascia and a small, discreet scratch near the rear wheel well. Inside, the premium leather interior is clean and smoke-free; while there is some gentle creasing on the driver’s seat bolster consistent with careful use, the cabin remains a quiet, refined space. Every technological feature, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, is in full working order. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound, having followed a strict maintenance schedule with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of brake pads. The engine is responsive, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires provide plenty of grip for the seasons ahead. This is a solid, reliable vehicle that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. With a history of diligent ownership, it offers a refined driving experience and exceptional long-term value. We invite you to inspect this distinguished addition to our curated inventory.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This model has been curated for the discerning driver who prioritizes consistent performance and a well-maintained history. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our dealership's exacting standards, this automobile offers a sophisticated driving experience and represents an outstanding investment in quality and longevity.

Hey there! I'm selling my awesome car and it's looking for a new adventure! It’s been super well-loved and is in really solid shape—perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs like a dream and is super clean inside and out. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner will absolutely love it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains crisp, with recent VANOS servicing and subframe reinforcement already completed for peace of mind. Power is delivered via a 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. The chassis retains its factory-spec handling characteristics with refreshed bushings and dampers. While exhibiting minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity is excellent, offering a tactile driving experience and balanced weight distribution. A driver-focused machine ready for the canyons.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Everything functions properly.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has undergone regular servicing, including recent fluid changes and a brake inspection, ensuring a smooth and confident ride. It starts reliably every time and handles beautifully on both city streets and highways. This is a dependable, honest car ready for its next owner to drive home today.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated engineering. Having passed a rigorous multi-point inspection, this specimen offers a refined driving experience and remains in commendable condition both aesthetically and operationally. This selection represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balanced synthesis of performance and enduring value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a sophisticated driving experience with a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, this vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning motorist.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a total joy to drive. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me through every trip. It’s perfect if you're looking for a solid, stylish car that’s been well-loved and is ready for many more adventures. I’ve taken great care of it, and I just know you’re going to love getting behind the wheel as much as I have! Let’s find this beauty a great new home!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS variable valve timing system. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential for optimal corner-exit traction. This example is mechanically robust, with proactive maintenance addressing the rod bearings and rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis remains composed and communicative, benefiting from refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers that preserve the car's near-perfect 50/50 weight distribution. Experience the perfect balance of performance and reliability with this meticulously maintained vehicle. The exterior shines in its original factory finish, showing only minor signs of careful use consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features—from the crisp infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is sound, having undergone regular synthetic oil changes and recent brake service. It drives straight and true, offering a smooth, quiet ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership. This is a turn-key opportunity for a driver seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle without the new-car depreciation. Complete service records available upon request.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated presentation, this automobile balances reliable performance with enduring value. Thoroughly inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, it stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and responsible ownership.
